sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (select --  ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.AccountInfoId
,ap.TemplateType
,ap.RecipientType
,ap.SmsText
,ap.EmailText
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
 inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0



 )t1
left join Temp_hcAppointmentReminderTemplate t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select -- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.AppointmentId
,ap.Comment
,ap.ReviewedById
,ap.ReviewedOn
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.StartDate
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.hcAppointments ha on (ap.AppointmentId=ha.AppointmentId )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ha.clientId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0


 )t1
left join Temp_hcAppointmentSessionComments t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select  -- ap.*

inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (ap.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join Temp_hcAppointmentUnarchivedReasons t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.clientId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0

 )t1
left join Temp_hcAppointments t2 on t1.AppointmentId = t2.AppointmentId AND t1.StartDate = t2.StartDate
WHERE t2.AppointmentId IS NULL AND t2.StartDate IS NULL
select AppointmentId,StartDate from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select  --ap.*
ap.Id
,ap.DayId
,ap.StartTime
,ap.EndTime
,ap.EntityTypeId
,ap.EntityId
,ap.ExpirationDate
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap  
inner join dbo.hcStaffMember hs on ( ap.entityid=hs.id  )  
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =hs.tblmemberId    )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where entitytypeid=1
and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
--and ap.Ismigrated=0
union
select --ap.*
ap.Id
,ap.DayId
,ap.StartTime
,ap.EndTime
,ap.EntityTypeId
,ap.EntityId
,ap.ExpirationDate
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap  
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.entityid=p.id )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where entitytypeid=2
and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
 )t1
left join Temp_hcAvailabilities t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select   --ap.*

,ap.StartDate
,ap.billingCode
,ap.modifier
,ap.units
,ap.hcUnitTypeId
,ap.charges
,ap.diagnosisCode
,ap.diagnosisCode2

,ap.DateDeleted

,ap.modifier2
,ap.unitRate
,ap.billingCodeDescription
,ap.AppointmentId

inner join dbo.hcEncounters hc on (ap.hcEncounterId=hc.id ) 
inner join ChildProfile p on (hc.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0

 )t1

WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select t1.* from (
select --ap.*
ap.id
,ap.hcChildProfileAuthorizationId
,ap.hcProviderBillingCodeId
,ap.NoOfUnits
,ap.hcUnitTypeId
,ap.hcFrequencyTypeId
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.SchedulingGoalNoOfUnits
,ap.SchedulingGoalFrequencyTypeId
,ap.hcProviderServiceId
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 		
inner join  dbo.hcProviderBillingCode bc on ( ap.hcProviderBillingCodeId=bc.id   )
inner join hcChildProfileAuthorization aa on (aa.id=ap.hcChildProfileAuthorizationId)
inner join ChildProfile p on (aa.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=bc.accountinfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
 )t1
left join Temp_hcChildProfileAuthorizationBillingCode t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
